user_prompt: Announce that our bakery is now open on Sundays
content:
🎉 Exciting News, Sweet Lovers! 🎉

We’re thrilled to announce that our bakery is now open on Sundays! 🍰✨ Whether you’re craving a warm croissant with your morning coffee or a slice of decadent cake for an afternoon treat, we’ve got you covered.

The latest trends show that more bakeries are embracing Sundays, and we’re joining the movement! We believe that weekends should be filled with delightful flavors and the comforting aroma of freshly baked goods. From artisanal breads to indulgent pastries, our Sunday menu is designed to elevate your weekend experience. 

Bring your family and friends to enjoy a cozy day in our bakery, where every bite is made with love and the finest ingredients. Plus, stop by for our Sunday special—a surprise treat that changes weekly! It’s the perfect excuse to indulge and discover something new.

Join us this Sunday, and let’s make sweet memories together! Your weekend just got a whole lot tastier. 🍞❤️

#Bakery #SundayTreats #FreshBakedGoods #SweetSunday #LocalBakery #WeekendBaking #DeliciousDesserts

📰 Sources:
· [Retail Watch: Lehigh Valley dessert shops kicks off seasonal hours with latest location](https://www.mcall.com/2026/05/16/retail-watch-indulge-your-sweet-tooth-at-this-lehigh-valley-dessert-shop-with-multiple-locations/)
· [This is where chefs hang out on their day off](https://politiken.dk/edition/guides/art10843919/This-is-where-chefs-hang-out-on-their-day-off)
